title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 25 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 25 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report April 25 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 25/04/2025
Today, the DCE iron ore futures contract remained stable in the morning but pulled back significantly in the afternoon, trading in the doldrumsthroughout the day. The most-traded contract I2509 finally closed at 709, with a daily decline of 1.87%. Traders' willingness to sell was moderate, while steel mills showed good restocking demand, particularly at lower levels.
